title: Statistical Process Control Limit Calculator
description: Calculates control limits for X-bar and R charts based on subgroup data, with process capability analysis and actionable insights per ISO 7870, Six Sigma, and Lean standards.

inputs.label: Subgroup Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of samples per subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical values: 3-10.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of samples per subgroup for X-bar and R charts. Typical values: 3-10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: X-bar ve R grafikleri için alt grup başına örnek sayısı. Tipik değerler: 3-10.

inputs.label: Number of Subgroups (k)
inputs.businessContext: Total subgroups used to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total subgroups used to estimate process variation. Minimum 10 for reliable limits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses değişkenliğini tahmin etmek için kullanılan toplam alt grup sayısı. Güvenilir limitler için minimum 10.

inputs.label: Overall Mean (X-double-bar)
inputs.businessContext: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average of subgroup means. Central line for X-bar chart.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt grup ortalamalarının ortalaması. X-bar grafiği için merkez çizgisi.

inputs.label: Average Range (R-bar)
inputs.businessContext: Mean of subgroup ranges. Used to estimate process sigma.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean of subgroup ranges. Used to estimate process sigma.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt grup aralıklarının ortalaması. Proses sigmasını tahmin etmek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri veya tasarım gereksinimine göre izin verilen maksimum değer.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum acceptable value per customer or design requirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri veya tasarım gereksinimine göre izin verilen minimum değer.

inputs.label: Chart Type
inputs.businessContext: Select control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select control chart type. Xbar-R for small subgroups, Xbar-s for larger, I-MR for individual measurements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kontrol grafiği türünü seçin. Küçük alt gruplar için Xbar-R, büyük alt gruplar için Xbar-s, bireysel ölçümler için I-MR.

inputs.label: Use Estimated Sigma from R-bar
inputs.businessContext: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, sigma is estimated from R-bar/d2. If false, use pooled standard deviation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, sigma R-bar/d2'den tahmin edilir. Yanlışsa, havuzlanmış standart sapma kullanılır.

rules.message: Subgroup size must be between 2 and 25.
At least 10 subgroups required for reliable limits.
LSL must be less than USL.
Overall mean should be within specification limits for capable process.
Average range must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Process capability (Cpk) below 1.33. Process not capable per Six Sigma standards.
Process capability (Cpk) below 1.0. Immediate improvement required.
Process performance (Ppk) below 1.33. Long-term capability insufficient.
One or more points beyond control limits. Process out of statistical control.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
